stocks.impact_theory: Trump's statement extending Iran war 2-3 weeks caused oil surge to $110+ WTI, boosting integrated oil majors. Economic: higher energy prices inflate costs but profit margins for producers expand. Psychology: fear of supply disruption drives buying. Historical: similar to 2022 Ukraine invasion oil rally. Analogies: like betting on storm profits for umbrella makers; fueling the fire benefits firefighters (oil cos).

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Oil up 10% post-speech, X posts bullish on energy amid war prolongation, web news highlight energy winners.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long XOM for 10-15% gains in week if oil >$115
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or short if de-escalation sudden
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Quick war end drops oil, broader recession from inflation.

stocks.justification: Strong X/web sentiment alignment with historical oil-war links.

stocks.impact_theory: Prolonged Middle East conflict risks Strait of Hormuz, surging oil benefits Chevron's upstream ops. Implications: margin expansion offsets global slowdown. Psych: safe haven in energy. Parallels: Gulf War 1990 oil spike. Analogies: drought boosts water companies; war boosts arms and oil.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Similar to XOM, oil surge direct tailwind, positive mentions in war-impact articles.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long CVX targeting 12% upside near 52w high
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: OPEC+ ramps production, US shale floods market.

stocks.justification: Consistent energy sector rotation in news/X.

stocks.impact_theory: Iran war escalation signals higher munitions demand, restocking needs post-Ukraine. Econ: govt spending up. Psych: defense as safe bet. Parallels: post-9/11 defense boom. Analogies: insurance stocks rise pre-storm; defense pre-war.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X discussions on munitions low, web on defense despite recent cool-off.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Budget cuts if quick win, peak already priced.

stocks.justification: Mixed defense performance but logical beneficiary.

stocks.impact_theory: Missile systems demand from Iran strikes. Implications: backlog growth. Psych: war premium. Parallels: Iraq war RTX gains. Analogies: locksmith during crime wave.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: War continuation supports, though stocks cooled per Reuters.

stocks.impact_theory: Oil surge raises fuel costs 20-30%, squeezing margins amid demand uncertainty from war. Econ: higher CPI curbs travel. Psych: risk-off hits cyclicals. Parallels: 2022 oil spike airline drop. Analogies: drivers hate gas hikes; airlines hate oil spikes.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Airlines tumbled on oil jump per news/X, sector index -4% prior.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Avoid, wait for dip buy post-deescalation
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short DAL for 10% downside if oil >$115
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Demand rebound if war short, hedging protects.

stocks.justification: Direct oil cost link, historical precedent.
